scripts.docker:up: docker rm -f linea-supply-local-demo 2>/dev/null || true; docker run -d --name linea-supply-local-demo -p 3001:3001 -p 8001:8001 -v "$(pwd)":/workspaces/app -v linea-supply-local-demo-nm:/workspaces/app/node_modules -w /workspaces/app linea-supply-dev:local bash -lc "set -euo pipefail; npm ci --no-audit --no-fund; exec just dev"
scripts.docker:dev: npm run docker:build && npm run docker:up
